analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet condemns the US for repeatedly withdrawing from international agreements and organizations, portraying it as unilateralist and practicing power politics. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent): Applicable. The tweet depicts the US (the West) as irresponsible and hostile to multilateral norms, aligning with the portrayal of Western immorality/hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Not promoted; the tweet does not mention China’s cooperative role or benevolence. CH3 (China has an epic history): Not relevant; no historical resilience narrative. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values): Not addressed; no reference to China’s domestic political system or values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds): Not mentioned; no claims about CCP governance outcomes. CH6 (China is an interesting country in terms of culture, nature and heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH1 is promoted.
